languages.text: "Я принял руководство сектором на себя, но стараюсь придерживаться мудрости, дарованной отсеку Адептус Механикус. Священые аугментации устанавливаются строго в соответствии со статусом пострадавшего и его эффективностью". {n}Мартинакс вздрагивает и тихо добавляет:{/n} "Я звучу совсем как генетор Ферренц, не так ли?"

"I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

"I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

"I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

languages.text: "Ich habe mittlerweile die Verwaltung des Sektors übernommen und bemühe mich nach Kräften, die Weisheit des Adeptus Mechanicus in die Tat umzusetzen. Wir installieren heilige Augmentationen basierend auf dem Status der Patienten und ihrer Effizienz." {n}Martinax schaudert und fügt leise hinzu:{/n} "Ich klinge schon wie Genetor Ferrenz, oder?"
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe mittlerweile die Verwaltung des Sektors übernommen und bemühe mich nach Kräften, die Weisheit des Adeptus Mechanicus in die Tat umzusetzen. Wir installieren heilige Augmentationen basierend auf dem Status der Patienten und ihrer Effizienz." {n}Martinax schaudert und fügt leise hinzu:{/n} "Ich klinge schon wie Genetor Ferrenz, oder?"

languages.text: « J'ai repris la direction du secteur, mais je m'efforce d'adhérer aux enseignements dispensés par l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Les augmentations sacrées sont allouées sur la seule base du statut et de l'efficacité de chaque patient. » {n}Martinax frémit et ajoute à voix basse :{/n} « On croirait entendre le genetor Ferrenz, vous ne trouvez pas ? »
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai repris la direction du secteur, mais je m'efforce d'adhérer aux enseignements dispensés par l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Les augmentations sacrées sont allouées sur la seule base du statut et de l'efficacité de chaque patient. » {n}Martinax frémit et ajoute à voix basse :{/n} « On croirait entendre le genetor Ferrenz, vous ne trouvez pas ? »

languages.text: “我已接管该区域的管理之职，我将竭力遵循机械修会赐予我们的智慧。神圣植入物的安装将严格遵照患者身份与效能原则。”{n}马丁纳克斯轻颤着低声补充道，{/n}“我听起来是不是很像基因士费伦茨？”
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: “我已接管该区域的管理之职，我将竭力遵循机械修会赐予我们的智慧。神圣植入物的安装将严格遵照患者身份与效能原则。”{n}马丁纳克斯轻颤着低声补充道，{/n}“我听起来是不是很像基因士费伦茨？”

languages.text: «He asumido la gestión del sector, pero me esfuerzo por seguir la sabiduría del Adeptus Mechanicus. Los aumentos sagrados se instalan cumpliendo estrictamente los criterios de eficacia y estado del paciente». {n}Martinax se estremece y añade en voz baja:{/n} «Sueno como el genetor Ferrenz, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: «He asumido la gestión del sector, pero me esfuerzo por seguir la sabiduría del Adeptus Mechanicus. Los aumentos sagrados se instalan cumpliendo estrictamente los criterios de eficacia y estado del paciente». {n}Martinax se estremece y añade en voz baja:{/n} «Sueno como el genetor Ferrenz, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: 「この部門の管理は私が引き継いだものの、私は機械神官団が授けた知恵に従う努力をしています。聖なる増幅は患者の状態と効率に厳密に準じて設置されています。」{n}マーティナックスは震えながら、静かに付け加える。{/n}「私はゲネトール・フェレンツのように聞こえるようですね」
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: 「この部門の管理は私が引き継いだものの、私は機械神官団が授けた知恵に従う努力をしています。聖なる増幅は患者の状態と効率に厳密に準じて設置されています。」{n}マーティナックスは震えながら、静かに付け加える。「私はゲネトール・フェレンツのように聞こえるようですね」

languages.text: "Yönetimi devraldım ama Adeptus Mechanicus'un bize bahşettiği bilgeliğe bağlı kalmaya gayret ediyorum. Kutsal ogmentasyonlar, hasta durumuna ve verimliliğine tam uyum içinde kuruluyor." {n}Martinax, ürperip sessizce ekliyor.{/n} "Genetör Ferrenz gibi konuşuyorum, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"
